steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content:
The sentence uses but to set up a contrast. The artisans are described as doing something with traditional techniques passed down since the thirteenth century, but then “they don't strictly observe every tradition”—with an example showing they've modernized their tools.

The blank should describe their general relationship to these techniques in a way that makes this contrast meaningful.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”Adhere to” means “follow”—the perfect fit for a contrast sentence: they typically follow the traditional techniques, but have updated some tools.

The other three suggest innovation as their primary behavior (experiment with), changes to the techniques themselves (improve on), or struggle (grapple with), none of which align with the “but they don't strictly observe every tradition” framing.

That is the correct answer.
